translated: Hello,
everyone.
I am Nakashima Yuki,
the voice of Hinomori Shiho from Leo/need.
Thank you so much
for this letter.
Hello, hello.
I am so excited that Leo/need's long-awaited first one-man live as pros is finally happening.
The letter says, "Personally, I would love to see an MC segment where everyone swaps instruments during the actual show."
Thank you very much.
I would definitely
like to see that.
But she might hate it.
If I were in her position, I would be incredibly nervous.
I wonder...
If Shiho had to play the drums or the keyboard instead of the bass,
I wonder if she would actually be willing to go along with it.
They did it because it was just a rehearsal, but when it comes to music,
she is so confident in her skills that her pride might make her refuse even for an MC segment, but I still want to see it.
I want to see her getting all flustered.
I really want to see everyone struggling and saying they can't do it.
I feel like I could listen to that and watch it forever.
Yes.
I want them to do it.
I wonder what would happen.
I am looking forward to seeing how the story develops.
I can't really imagine Shiho on the drums.
That is true.
She seems like she would be good at keeping rhythm, so she might handle it well, but
since your hands and feet have to move differently, she might end up fumbling after all.
I am curious.
I would like to see her on guitar too.
Yes.
I really want to see that.
She would definitely end up saying she can't do it.
True.
Exactly.
I definitely want to see that.
Everyone, please look forward to the future story.
Thank you for the letter.
I have picked out another scene that I personally want to talk about,
so let's take a look right away.
The one I chose is from Episode 8.
Here it is.
Can you play the guitar as well as the bass, Nakashima-san?
No, I can't.
She is giving up on both the one-man and the Fan Festa.
She said she looked into everything she possibly could on her own.
She understands how both sides of the audience feel now.
But what about Hona-chan's role as a leader?
She still hasn't found
the answer within herself as to which is better.
It is great that she researches every little detail.
She wants to show the way. Ichika-chan told her not to take it all on herself, and it is something for everyone to decide, but if she stays indecisive, it might just lead everyone astray.
That is why
she needs to make up her mind.
It is wonderful that she feels she has to decide on her own feelings here.
But I also hope it doesn't become too much of a burden for her.
Look.
The fans will definitely be happy with a new song for the one-man.
And she thinks Saki-chan and Shiho-chan would surely want to do that too.
However,
I really love this song.
Yes.
Episode 7 was great too.
It makes you feel like you aren't alone.
She wants people who love Virtual Singers to hear their music too.
Ichika-chan surely feels the same way.
If you think too much, you won't be able to choose.
If I have to choose one,
then I...
What I choose is...
Wait?
Shindo-san?
Good work today.
Good work.
I am sorry
for calling so late.
There is something I need to report urgently.
The timing was so perfect, it really surprised me.
